steps.title: Identify Lowell's actions
steps.content: The student wants Percival Lowell's contributions, so the answer should name what Lowell himself did. The notes say he began searching for Planet X in 1905 and left money to upgrade the observatory.

steps.title: Reject other focuses
steps.content: A only says Lowell was honored, B centers on Tombaugh's photographic evidence, and C wrongly says Lowell recorded that evidence in 1930. The choice naming Lowell's search and observatory funding gives the requested contributions. The answer is D.
